'''Fleet Group One''' was the command of [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. Its flagship was the [[Bothan Assault Cruiser]] ''[[Ralroost]]''. Kre'fey's tactics during the battle were rather conservative—thousands of his ships defected to [[Fleet Group Two]], which was under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]. The majority of the surviving ships retreated along with the ''Ralroost'' to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] bastion of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], and it conducted a series of raids on Yuuzhan Vong targets throughout the galaxy in the following months. The fleet group was once again led by the ''Ralroost'' in the massive ambush at [[Ebaq 9]] in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]], which saw the New Republic decimate a Vong armada led by [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]]. The fleet group's assets were divided and reassigned when the Republic was reorganized into the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].
